heading: Omitted

notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to filing of claims by members of the Osage Tribe and reversion of unclaimed shares, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–586, § 386 Stat. 1296Oct. 27, 1972
